{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230419261937BAC06AF3D9669E0C"}"},"total":635},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7299053207170810676","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我是第一次看过如此特别的恐怖小说！这也不能说是恐怖小说了，本来是一部很恐怖的小说画面，却因为主角太强至少降低了90%恐怖感。谢谢作者好神奇的体验[赞][赞][赞]","text_exts":[{"e":16,"s":12,"text":"恐怖小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774210766D9669E0C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227299053207170810676%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227216363610774178831%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699444827,"group_id":"7216363610774178831","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6PY7gI0TJUgCXnxhi+pAaA9Sjvu/NPGoPZgX+IRvleZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4473283536235917","user_name":"爱吃包菜海鲜粥的宝玉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4473283536235917","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7216363610774178831","book_info":{"abstract":"脑洞+无敌+规则怪谈+无女主+悬疑+恐怖
不是无脑爽，有剧情，介意勿入。
诡异降临全球，龙国在一次次的诡异打击下日渐式微，国际地位急剧下降！
眼看着在经历一次诡异的洗礼，龙国即将彻底败落！
但就在此时，一个来自龙国的名人被抓进了诡异世界。。。。。。。
看着大屏幕上的那道身影，龙国集体沉默了，这不是龙国最有名的神棍张卜卦吗？
完了，完了！这个经常在电视上出现，教人画假符咒的假道士竟然成了龙国最后的希望！
但就在此时，屏幕上的张卜卦却是突然大笑了起来。
所有人都以为他被吓傻了，没想到他的下一句话却是。
“大家好，正式介绍一下，我叫张卜卦，龙虎山第69代张天师！”
“抓鬼？老子就是这个行业的巅峰！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oa55d97023e49f3013e3fcf5dfa067d91~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"寅时三刻","author_id":"","book_id":"7216363610774178831","book_name":"当规则怪谈，遇到张天师","book_short_name":"邪仙怪谈","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7216363755666571809","read_count":"13915","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"500592"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"242","tags":"悬疑脑洞,灵异,无敌,无女主,无后宫,规则怪谈,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6c3abcf22b69c398218e0b5d402b323c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394766&x-signature=kSJhCmlUHI4NSVULb8iDthSt%2Bd8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1306660407092141","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.109402e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230419261937BAC06AF3D9669E0C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读49小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":143445,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":175185,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":13517},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7321736302314128154","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很棒的书，不像普通规则怪谈那样，原本看到“第六十九代”时还以为这只是一本借用张天师名号的普通爽文，想着完结后糊弄着给个三四星就好，没想到越看越不对劲，结尾给了我一个大惊喜，没有强行圆满，好像所有的轰轰烈烈都被收拢，在看不到的地方绽放，作者的文笔和剧情安排都很优秀，有那么一瞬间我有点舍不得，这本书太短了，但仔细想想，这才是最适合它的安排，像边疆的雪，璀璨又平凡。","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":9,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774210766D9669E0C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227321736302314128154%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227216363610774178831%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704725210,"group_id":"7216363610774178831","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2vblWekzSOse7da/PLqQTdMAWAEmNZ1OvYdTFezVOi6","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3327550453463181","user_name":"安南国的梁长柏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3327550453463181","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cer
